\tzpentry{ID4308}{Holonomy Pi Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4308 introduces Holonomy Pi Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\oint_{S^1} k \cdot dl = 2\pi n$
\]
